package handler

import "net/http"

type API struct{}

// helperUtil no recibe (w, r) y no se considera handler.
func (a *API) helperUtil() string {
	return "x"
}

// freeFunction tampoco (no receiver API).
func freeFunction(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	w.Write([]byte("free"))
}

// otherReceiver tiene receiver no-API.
type Other struct{}

func (o *Other) leaks(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	w.Write([]byte("other"))
}
